subject: Charged twice for annual renewal
body: Our team was charged twice for the annual renewal and I need the duplicate payment reversed. The account owner is already worried that auto-renew is still enabled.

subject: Where can I find prior receipts?
body: I am comparing receipts before I upgrade and just need the right help article. If there is a docs link for downloading old receipts, that should be enough.
answer: Please see the help center article.

subject: API usage endpoint returning 500
body: The /v1/usage endpoint started returning intermittent 500s right after today's deploy and our dashboards are broken. Please investigate and share an ETA for a fix.

subject: Webhook filtering on roadmap?
body: We are evaluating the platform and want to know whether webhook subscriptions can be filtered by environment and event type. No rush, I mainly want to know if the feature is planned.
